The following video games have been considered among the best of all time by video game journalists or magazines in lists dedicated to selecting the best games. Each game is included on at least six separate best-of lists from different publications (inclusive of all time periods, platforms and genres), as chosen by their editorial staffs and solicited experts.

List

  • 1970
  • 1975
  • 1980
  • 1985
  • 1990
  • 1995
  • 2000
  • 2005
  • 2010
  • 2015
  • 2020
video games considered the best

Publications

The reference numbers in the notes section show which of the 56 selected publications list the game.
